zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH价格围绕1660附近震荡，整体仍低于20日均线1692，短期结构偏弱，呈现震荡下行整理格局。

MACD指标维持-20.13的负值动能，空头力量仍占优，且缺乏RSI参考下动量偏弱，反弹持续性不足。

下方支撑关注1658及1650区域，上方压力集中在1670与1695（20日均线附近），区间边界清晰。

短线建议以区间交易为主，未有效突破1695前谨慎追多，跌破1650则可能打开进一步回调空间。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently consolidating within a tight intraday range around 1662, reflecting a lack of strong directional conviction. The 24-hour change of 0.15% highlights market indecision following recent volatility compression. Price trading below the 20-day SMA suggests short-term bearish pressure persists, with rallies facing overhead supply. Overall structure indicates a corrective phase rather than a sustained bullish continuation, with momentum remaining subdued across lower timeframes.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -20.13 confirms bearish momentum remains active, though without a visible signal line crossover, suggesting trend continuation rather than reversal. RSI data is unavailable, limiting overbought/oversold assessment. The 20-day SMA near 1692 acts as a dynamic resistance level, with price currently trading beneath it, indicating sellers still maintain short-term control over trend direction.

Immediate resistance is found at 1664.05, aligning with the recent session high, followed by stronger resistance at the 1692 SMA zone. A break above this region would be required to shift momentum bullish. On the downside, initial support sits at 1657.83, with a deeper support area near 1650. Sustained breakdown below support could expose further downside pressure and extend the corrective structure.

Short-term trading conditions favor range-bound strategies rather than breakout positioning until clearer momentum emerges. Traders may consider selling into resistance near 1664–1692 while watching for rejection signals, or cautiously accumulating near 1650–1658 support with tight risk controls. A decisive breakout above 1692 would shift bias toward bullish continuation, while a breakdown below 1650 would increase downside exposure and validate bearish trend extension.
